attacking_style: Explosive long-range attacks (2km+ on punchy finishes, 26km+ on climbs) rather than tactical waiting. Prefers surprising early moves on final climb approaches or punchy uphill finishes where sustained power meets explosive acceleration.
team_tactics: Deceuninck/Quick-Step controls tempo in final 30km before his attacks. When in yellow, team sits up on transition stages for conservation. Can execute domestique isolation tactics when supporting others (e.g., Evenepoel 2022).
terrain_preference: Punchy uphill finishes with gradients 10-19% under 2km, technical descents for time gains, short explosive climbs. Exposed on multi-day Alpine blocks and sustained high-altitude MTFs beyond 5km.
vulnerability: Cracks on multi-stage Alpine blocks when pace sustained through high mountains (lost time stages 15-19 in 2019 Tour). Energy management in longer efforts—burns matches with premature long-distance attacks (30km out Paris-Nice 2020). Declining explosiveness on steepest hairpins post-2021 (4th Fleche Wallonne 2022).
key_patterns: Attacks with unusual distance remaining: 26km, 2km+ moves instead of final-kilometer accelerations (4 instances)
Aggressive yellow jersey defense: attacks in leader's jersey rather than conservative riding (5 instances)
Strong uphill time trial performance: beat Contador, Thomas against expectations showing TT climbing punch (3 instances)
Form peaks early season/Classics: Tirreno attacks signal readiness, fades in third-week Grand Tours (4 instances)
Technical descending as tactical weapon: leads descents even in yellow jersey to gain time (2 instances)
Vulnerable when isolated: cracks when teammates unavailable and pace sustained by rivals (3 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows tactical KOM hunting rather than competitive aggression. 2022 crashes and domestique duties marked leadership transfer. Peak 2019-2021 dominance declining, explosiveness on steepest gradients diminished by 2022 Fleche Wallonne.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 17
